name: Baseball All-Star Cookie Treat
recipeInstructions: Grease a 12-inch pizza pan. In a large saucepan over medium heat, melt the marshmallows and margarine, stirring constantly until the mixture is smooth. Add the cereal; stir until evenly coated. Press the mixture evenly into the greased pan. Cool completely. Spread frosting over the cereal mixture to within 1 inch of the edge. Using tinted frosting, decorate the frosted area to resemble a baseball. Add a message, if desired. Cut into wedges to serve.
